project_type: React SPA board game (Shogun-themed strategy game)
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent && npx tsc -b && npx vite build
test_command: No tests configured - use build as validation
verification_instructions: Run tsc -b to type-check, then vite build to confirm no errors
environment_constraints: No test framework, validation via TypeScript compilation and Vite build only
key_patterns: Zustand store (gameStore.ts) holds all game state. Components use useGameStore() hook. i18n via useT() hook or standalone t() function. Figure size overrides in FIGURE_SIZE_OVERRIDES record in RegionDetailModal.tsx. Portals (createPortal) used for overlay popups in BattlePanel.
directory_structure: src/components/ - React components, src/store/ - Zustand store, src/i18n/ - translations (en.ts, es.ts, index.ts), src/utils/ - game logic, src/types/ - TypeScript types
